channel.title: Shanghai Weather Forecast
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Shanghai via QWeather.

item.title: 2026-04-20: Overcast, 14°C - 22°C
item.description:
Condition (Day): Overcast (Icon: 104)
Condition (Night): Overcast (Icon: 104)
Temperature: 14°C to 22°C
Precipitation: 0.0 mm
Cloud Cover: 25%

Wind (Day): N (0°), Scale 1-3, Speed 16 km/h
Wind (Night): NE (45°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h

Humidity: 61%
Visibility: 25 km
Sun: Rise 05:22, Set 18:26
Moon: Rise 06:52, Set 21:53 (Phase: Waxing crescent,801)
UV Index: 3
